response: impression What biblical book is attributed to a prophet named in its first verse who lived during the Assyrian Period? impression The answer identifies the prophet as Obadiah. impression This figure is recognized in both Judaism and Christianity. impression The text explicitly names the author in the opening line. impression The historical context places the writing in the Assyrian era. impression Obadiah is the shortest book in the Old Testament. impression The reasoning confirms the name matches the first verse. impression The final conclusion states the name Obadiah clearly.
